---
name: Release Tracker
about: Auto-created by setup-release-branch.yml. Not for manual use.
title: "Release X.Y.Z"
labels: release-tracker
---

Tracker for [`release-__VERSION__`](https://github.com/espressosystems/espresso-network/tree/release-__VERSION__). Comment `/tag` (or `/tag <X.Y.Z.N>`) to cut a tag, `/promote <stage>` (or `/promote <tag> <stage>`) to promote, `/done <sha>` to mark a commit as ported (ticked), `/skip <sha>` to mark it as deliberately ignored (struck through), `/unmark <sha>` to undo either. See [RELEASES.md](https://github.com/espressosystems/espresso-network/blob/main/RELEASES.md).

_Tracker contents will be populated on the next refresh._
